body_html:
you can go home

--- danars07@aol.com wrote:

Jeffrey,
Hi! I was just wondering if you knew what your
plans were for this weekend or if I would be going.
My grandma just had her leg amputated and she isn't
doing very well so my mom said that i should try to
come home this weekend to see her. I realize you
probably don't know your plans yet but when you do
please let me know. thanks! Dana B
